story.iWant: extension project structure với proper organization
story.soThat: code is maintainable và follows best practices

subtasks.subtask: Verify folder structure matches architecture spec
Set TypeScript compiler options (target, module, etc.)
Test import từ frontend using alias
Add other frontend dependencies (Radix UI, Zustand, React Query, etc.)
Add extension-specific dependencies (chrome types, webpack, etc.)
Verify README instructions are clear và complete

acceptanceCriteria.ac: Extension directory structure created với folders: `src/content-script/`, `src/sidepanel/`, `src/background/`, `src/shared/`
TypeScript configuration với path aliases to frontend (`@/*` → `../frontend/src/*`)
Package.json với dependencies matching frontend (React, TypeScript, Tailwind, etc.)

doc.title: Browser Extension Architecture - Suna.so
doc.snippet: Recommended structure: extension/ với src/content-script/, src/sidepanel/, src/background/, src/shared/. Alternative simpler structure uses direct import với path aliases.

doc.title: Browser Extension Architecture - Suna.so
doc.snippet: React 18+, TypeScript 5+, Tailwind CSS 4+, Chrome Extension Manifest V3. Extension uses path aliases để import từ frontend codebase.

doc.title: Suna.so Browser Extension - Epic Breakdown
doc.snippet: Epic 10 establishes extension project structure, build configuration, basic manifest, và shared code setup để enable code reuse từ frontend.

doc.title: Suna.so Browser Extension - Epic Breakdown
doc.snippet: As a developer, I want extension project structure với proper organization, So that code is maintainable và follows best practices. Acceptance criteria include directory structure, TypeScript config, package.json, và README.

doc.title: Suna.so Browser Extension - Product Requirements Document
doc.snippet: Goals include tối đa hóa code reuse từ frontend Next.js (target ~95-98%) để giảm thiểu development effort và cung cấp trải nghiệm nhất quán với main app.

doc.title: ChainLens Crypto Services - Coding Standards
doc.snippet: Coding standards define directory organization và service structure patterns. Extension should follow similar organizational principles.

file.reason: Reference for exact dependency versions to match in extension package.json. Key dependencies: React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Radix UI, Zustand, React Query, Supabase.
Reference for TypeScript path alias configuration. Frontend uses `@/*` → `./src/*`. Extension should use `@/*` → `../frontend/src/*` để import từ frontend.
Example utility function to test path alias import. Should be importable via `@/lib/utils` from extension code.

constraint.description: Extension must maximize code reuse từ frontend (target ~95-98%). Use path aliases để import directly từ frontend codebase without copying code.
Extension follows recommended monorepo structure với shared code access via TypeScript path aliases. Alternative simpler structure (Direct Import) is also documented.
Extension dependencies must match frontend versions để ensure compatibility. Check frontend/package.json for exact versions.
TypeScript config must enable path aliases (`@/*` → `../frontend/src/*`) và match frontend compiler options để ensure type compatibility.
Extension directory structure must match architecture spec: `extension/src/` với subdirectories cho content-script, sidepanel, background, và shared code.
README must document project structure, setup instructions, build process, development workflow, và include links to architecture docs.

tests.standards: Testing standards: Verify directory structure matches spec, test TypeScript path alias resolution, verify package.json dependencies install correctly, verify README instructions are clear và complete. Use manual verification và basic import tests.

test.idea: Verify all required folders exist: src/content-script/, src/sidepanel/, src/background/, src/shared/, public/
Test TypeScript path alias: Create test file importing from `@/lib/utils` và verify it resolves correctly
Verify tsconfig.json compiler options match frontend config (target, module, etc.)
Run `npm install` và verify all dependencies install without errors
Compare extension package.json dependencies với frontend/package.json để ensure versions match
Review README.md và verify all sections are present và instructions are clear
Follow README setup instructions và verify they work correctly
